description: Create a new FOIA (Freedom of Information Act) request complaint in ArkCase. Log in as arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com (password: ArkCase1234!). Set the Complaint Title to 'Pesticide Registration Review Documents for Glyphosate - EPA-HQ-OPP-2009-0361', the Incident Category to 'Government', and the Priority to 'Medium'. For the Complaint Description, use: 'FOIA request from Natural Resources Defense Council for all pesticide registration review documents, risk assessments, and internal communications related to Glyphosate review under EPA-HQ-OPP-2009-0361.'
